buffs.name: Next Lure Free
buffs.description: The next lure you hit will have no effect on you!

buffs.name: Bigger Stomach
buffs.description: Your stomach has gotten bigger allowing you to eat more!

buffs.name: 10% Not Hook
buffs.description: Permenently gain a 10% chance to not be hooked by a lure!

buffs.name: Double Points
buffs.description: For 10 seconds double the points that you collect!

buffs.name: Increase Fish Size
buffs.description: Permanently increase your fish's size by 10%!

buffs.name: Increase Manuverablity
buffs.description: Permanently increase your fish's manuverability by 10%!

buffs.name: X-Ray
buffs.description: For 10 seconds you will clearly be able to tell lures and fish apart!
